name: opensearch-agent-skills
description: Use this plugin to build search applications (semantic, hybrid, neural sparse, agentic) and analyze observability data (logs and traces) with OpenSearch. Install all skills at once or pick individual ones — just ask your AI assistant to set up a search app, query logs, investigate traces, or deploy to AWS.
author: opensearch-project

skills.name: opensearch-skills
skills.description: All-in-one skill bundle: build search apps, analyze logs and traces, and deploy to AWS with OpenSearch.

skills.name: opensearch-launchpad
skills.description: Build search applications from scratch with semantic, hybrid, neural sparse, and agentic search strategies.

skills.name: log-analytics
skills.description: Query and analyze logs in OpenSearch using PPL and Query DSL for error patterns, anomaly detection, and log investigation.

skills.name: trace-analytics
skills.description: Investigate distributed traces and spans in OpenSearch for latency analysis, error debugging, and service dependency mapping.

skills.name: aws-setup
skills.description: Deploy OpenSearch search applications to Amazon OpenSearch Service or Amazon OpenSearch Serverless with Bedrock connectors.
